name: MCP4725 Output
description: The MCP4725 output component allows to use [12bit external DAC](https://learn.sparkfun.com/tutorials/mcp4725-digital-to-analog-converter-hookup-guide/all) in order to have analog output(s) on any board by using I2C. Devices default address is `0x60` and configurable alternative is `0x61`.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Manually specify the I2C address of the DAC. Defaults to `0x60`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.
